Motel_management/src/main/java/controlle.general_idea: Replace complex UI state management and business logic delegation with a simple call to make the interface visible.

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.general_idea: The entire implementation of the MotelManagement class was removed, leaving only the package declaration and class signature.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Mot.human_impl: Removed all fields, constructor, and methods from MotelManagement.java

Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.general_idea: The entire implementation of the Turn class was removed, leaving only the package declaration and class shell.
Motel_management/src/main/java/model/Tur.human_impl: Removed all fields, constructors, and methods from Turn.java

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.general_idea: Removed the CardLayout-based multi-view navigation system and all associated view components.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.human_impl: Deleted CardLayout, mainPanel, and all view fields (TurnSelectView, FloorView, etc.) and their initialization logic.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.general_idea: Removed public methods used to switch between different UI views.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.human_impl: Deleted setFloorView(), setTurnSelectView(), setRoomView(), and other navigation setters.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.general_idea: Removed getter methods for the various view components.
Removed the logic for synchronizing date and time labels across different views.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.human_impl: Deleted timeLabels/dateLabels maps, updateDateTime(), and getCurrentCard() logic.

Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.general_idea: Removed the method for configuring floor buttons dynamically.
Removed methods that checked which view was currently visible.
Removed the utility method for confirming receipt printing.
Motel_management/src/main/java/view/User.human_impl: Deleted confirmPrinting() method and its JOptionPane usage.

Motel_management/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
